candidates.why: Explicit total revenue/top-line line item and provided candidate.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit top-line revenue row.

candidates.why: Explicit operating overhead bucket covering staff and administrative expenses; populated across years.
Administrative overhead component, but appears to be part of the broader staff and administration subtotal.

variables.notes: Per SG&A hierarchy, an explicit SG&A-type row exists and is populated, so selected only 'Staff and administration expenses'. Excluded component/sub-bucket rows to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Best explicit interest expense line and clearly the main reported total interest expense.
Alternate label for interest expense that may be used in some periods, though empty in preview.
Interest-related but only a component, not preferred over the main total line.
Not interest expense; clearly a different concept.

variables.notes: Used the main total interest expense row first, with the alternate label as fallback for possible label changes across periods.

candidates.why: Best match for book equity/shareholders' equity and preferable to generic total equity when no separate NCI line exists.
Also matches total equity, but duplicates 'Total shareholders equity' values and is less specific.

candidates.why: Only a reserve component of equity, not total book equity.
Includes liabilities and therefore is not book equity.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Total shareholders equity' as the most specific book equity line. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback priority in case of label variation. No separate non-controlling interest line is present.
